executive_summary: Canada is experiencing an unprecedented ransomware surge with 103 organizations publicly listed as victims in a single day, June 23, 2026. High-profile Canadian targets include Canada Goose (coinbasecartel), National Money Mart with confirmed database leak (Everest), Peterborough Public Health (Lynx), Eastern Townships School Board (Qilin), and Municipality of North Perth (WorldLeaks). The Qilin ransomware group alone accounts for 22 victims, while Clop has claimed 13 Canadian entities and Play has hit 10 organizations. This represents a coordinated, large-scale campaign targeting critical sectors including healthcare, education, public services, financial institutions, and manufacturing across all provinces.

canada_landscape.summary: Canada faces a massive ransomware crisis with 103 organizations publicly listed as victims on June 23, 2026, representing an extraordinary coordinated attack wave. Critical infrastructure has been heavily impacted: Peterborough Public Health, Municipality of North Perth, MRC de Maskinongé regional government, Eastern Townships School Board, and Eeyou Communications Network (telecommunications). High-profile consumer brands including Canada Goose, Active Green + Ross, and Kids & Company have been compromised. No CCCS advisories were observed in this reporting period.
canada_landscape.retailers: Canada Goose (major retail brand, victim of CoinbaseCartel ransomware), Active Green + Ross (automotive retail chain, victim of Sinobi ransomware)
canada_landscape.financial: National Money Mart Company (financial services, victim of Everest ransomware with confirmed database leak), Morison Insurance Brokers (victim of Sinobi ransomware), Trucash (victim of Lynx ransomware), multiple accounting firms including Pewarchuk CPA, MG Chartered Professional Accountant, and Reidhurst Nagy

report_2w.executive_summary: The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security (CCCS) issued an urgent alert for the FortiBleed breach, exposing thousands of compromised Fortinet credentials. Splunk Enterprise is under active exploitation via CVE-2026-20253, a critical pre-authentication remote code execution flaw added to CISA's Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, requiring federal agencies to patch within 3 days. North Korean hackers executed a supply chain attack against Mastra AI via npm, while the Icarus threat group breached Klue's Salesforce OAuth tokens using legacy credentials. Multiple ransomware groups—including INC Ransom, PLAGUERAT, and The Gentlemen—claimed breaches totaling over 7TB of data from healthcare and HR organizations.

items.description: Critical pre-authentication remote code execution in Splunk Enterprise PostgreSQL sidecar component
items.cia_impact: Confidentiality: High, Integrity: High, Availability: High

items.description: Active exploitation of PAN-OS GlobalProtect VPN authentication bypass vulnerability
items.software_affected: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect VPN
items.cia_impact: Confidentiality: High, Integrity: High, Availability: Medium

items.description: Gamaredon APT campaign targeting Ukraine weaponizing this vulnerability
Apache path traversal vulnerability being actively scanned
items.cia_impact: Confidentiality: High, Integrity: High, Availability: Low

items.name: Sapphire Sleet (North Korean APT)
items.targets: Mastra AI npm package - supply chain attack
items.ttps: T1195.002 (Supply Chain Compromise: Software Supply Chain), malicious npm package postinstall payload

items.name: Icarus
items.targets: Klue - Salesforce OAuth token theft
items.ttps: T1550.001 (Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token), legacy credential exploitation, OAuth token theft via API

items.name: The Gentlemen (RaaS)
items.targets: TERRIO Therapy Fitness, multiple organizations
items.ttps: T1562.001 (Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools), GentleKiller EDR evasion framework targeting 400 security processes

items.name: INC Ransom
items.targets: Horizon Family Medical Group
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), data exfiltration of 7TB

items.name: PLAGUERAT
items.targets: Alcott HR
items.ttps: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application), exploitation of legacy VPN vulnerabilities

items.name: LOCKBIT5
items.targets: sra.nl
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact)

items.name: Gamaredon
items.targets: Ukraine government and critical infrastructure
items.ttps: T1203 (Exploitation for Client Execution), CVE-2025-8088 weaponization

items.name: Nemoris_Hacking
items.targets: FBI National Crime Information Center (alleged)
items.ttps: T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service), database breach claim

items.name: SocGholish (Operation Endgame)
items.targets: 14,971 WordPress sites
items.ttps: T1189 (Drive-by Compromise), malware injection into WordPress installations

canada_landscape.summary: The Canadian Centre for Cyber Security (CCCS) issued Alert AL26-014 on June 18, 2026, warning of the FortiBleed credential leak affecting thousands of compromised Fortinet devices. No specific breaches of major Canadian retailers, financial institutions, or critical infrastructure were reported in this period, though general surveillance and privacy concerns were noted regarding Canadian government legislation.
